title: rubus × samuelis
intro: Rubus × samuelis, also known as the thimbleberry, is a hybrid plant that combines the characteristics of the American raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the thimbleberry (Rubus parviflorus). The medicinal properties of Rubus × samuelis include its high content of antioxidants, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × samuelis include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Rubus × samuelis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or jam, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
